sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 50:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 50:1
items.html: Canceling the partition between the GE of the degree and its AHP is regarded as the breaching of the Parsa, meaning the cancelation of the boundary in it. This is done by lowering the bottom Hey to her actual place. (Inner Observation, Item 14)
